name: Virtual Analog
author: Emilie Gillet
description: Continuously variable analog waveforms with detuning, oscillator sync, and a Plaits Lab balance macro.

controls.label: Detune
controls.description: Detunes the paired oscillator across musical intervals.

controls.label: Pulse and sync
controls.description: Changes pulse width and introduces oscillator sync.

controls.label: Saw shape
controls.description: Changes the secondary oscillator saw shape.

controls.label: Oscillator balance
controls.description: Crossfades the square and variable-saw components.

outputs.main: Balanced square and variable-saw oscillator mixture.

upstream: Mutable Instruments eurorack Plaits source with the Rubato Plaits Lab fourth macro
